chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2792 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.11.2022 Mr. Jahanzeb Laghari advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with Mr. Shakeel Qureshi, Litigation Officer to Director School Education Hyderabad Region and Mitho Oad, DEO (Primary) Tando Allahyar. ----- Learned counsel for petitioner and learned AAG submit report that in compliance of the order of this court one Abdul Hakeem son of Muhammad Sharif has been posted as Teacher in Government Boys Primary School Haji Ahmed Ali Laghari and since this petition has served its purpose it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. This petition in the above terms stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
